required_tokens.TAGLINE: Short tagline e.g. 'Mobile Detailing on Your Driveway'
required_tokens.PRIMARY_COLOR: Hex — modern brand color (deep blue, charcoal, electric)
required_tokens.ACCENT_COLOR: CTA hex — energetic (electric green, orange, magenta)
required_tokens.TINT_BG_COLOR: Hex — pale tint for soft section backgrounds
required_tokens.HERO_HEADLINE: 8-12 word headline emphasizing 'we come to you'
required_tokens.HERO_IMAGE_URL: Path or absolute URL to action shot (truck, equipment, or service in progress)
required_tokens.AREA_HEADLINE: e.g. 'We cover the whole Bow Valley'
required_tokens.AREA_DESCRIPTION: 1-2 sentences about service area / radius / why mobile
required_tokens.RADIUS_NUMBER: Number to display in the radius graphic e.g. '40'
required_tokens.SERVICES_HTML: HTML chunk: 4-6 .service-card blocks (each with .service-icon, h3, p, .service-price with optional small)
required_tokens.EQUIPMENT_HTML: HTML chunk: 2 .equipment-item blocks (img + body with h3 + p)
